While India misses the current AI rally, opportunities lie in manufacturing and select financial services, with a positive outl

india_trends.title: NSE EGRs to commence trading from May 18. Here’s what gold investors should know
india_trends.summary: The NSE will launch trading in Electronic Gold Receipts (EGRs) from May 18, aiming to transform gold investing in India. The exchange said EGRs will make gold trading more transparent, secure and accessible through improved technology and liquidity. NSE believes the move could integrate gold into ma

india_trends.title: Emerging Currencies Dip as US Retail Data Boosts Dollar
india_trends.summary: Most emerging-market currencies fell Thursday on the back of a stronger dollar after US retail sales signaled consumer resilience in the world’s largest economy despite sharply higher gasoline prices.

india_trends.title: Rajesh Palviya of Axis Sec suggests Ajanta Pharma, Tata Communications, NMDC shares to buy today - 15 May
india_trends.summary: The stock market saw gains on May 15, with Sensex rising 451.46 points and Nifty 50 up 143.25 points, led by IT stocks. Oil companies faced declines after fuel price increases, while the market remains volatile within a range of 24,500 to 23,200.

india_trends.title: Global Market: China chip rally sparks valuation bubble fears among investors
india_trends.summary: Chinese chip companies are seeing high stock valuations. This surge is fueled by China's drive for technological self-reliance. However, recent earnings reports have raised concerns about potential market bubbles. Investors are closely watching developments and the broader semiconductor market trend

india_trends.title: 620% rally makes Cupid the costliest stock in its category at 197 P/E. Should investors be cautious?
india_trends.summary: Cupid, a contraceptives manufacturer, has seen a remarkable 620% rally in the past year, making it the costliest stock in its category with a P/E of 197. Despite strong fundamentals and technicals, experts advise caution for fresh investors due to its high valuation, suggesting partial profit-bookin

india_trends.title: RFBL Flexi Pack IPO allotment date today: Here are steps to check status online; GMP signals 8% listing gains
india_trends.summary: RFBL Flexi Pack IPO price band was set as ₹47 to ₹50 per share, and investors could apply for the offer in lots of 3000 shares. Shares of RFBL Flexi Pack will list on NSE SME next week on 19 May.

india_trends.title: Redington turns to air freight as Gulf conflict disrupts sea routes
india_trends.summary: Indian IT distributor Redington is using more air freight to deliver products to the Middle East. Conflict has disrupted sea routes, forcing this shift. india_trends.title: HAL shares drop over 4% after Q4 results. What are Goldman Sachs and Nomura saying?
india_trends.summary: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited shares fell over 4% despite reporting steady Q4FY26 earnings growth, strong sequential performance and higher annual profit. While Nomura maintained a ‘Buy’ rating, citing strong order backlog and valuations, Goldman Sachs stayed ‘Neutral’, pointing to weaker execution

india_trends.title: US Stock Market: Bond markets brace for higher-for-longer yields amid oil price surge
india_trends.summary: Investors anticipate prolonged elevated U.S. Treasury yields due to inflation concerns, particularly from surging oil prices amid Middle East conflict. Incoming Fed Chair Kevin Warsh faces challenges containing these pressures, as persistent inflation and potential policy shifts could further impact

india_trends.title: Tata Motors PV shares rally 8% even as Q4 net profit drops 32% YoY. Here's what Macquarie, Jefferies & other brokerages say
india_trends.summary: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles shares jumped significantly after reporting a profit drop for the fourth quarter of FY26. Revenue from operations saw an increase. The company also recommended a final dividend. Brokerage firms offered varied opinions, with some remaining bullish and others cautious ab
